Microsoft terminated Unit 8200 access to specific Azure/AI services (ACC positive, +3.2 on ACC dimension)
Multi-year SYS/BND/AWR failure (Microsoft Israel not transparent with HQ) materially offsets the ACC positive
Investigation findings not yet public; EFF/Amnesty/Access Now letter demands publication
rationale: Composite delta -2.8 is below 5pt change threshold. Strong ACC accumulation is offset by multi-year SYS/BND/AWR enablement failure. Net signal is mixed; band hold appropriate. Investigation-findings publication forward signal will determine future scoring direction.
